name: Nancy's Ice Cream Kolacky
recipeIngredient: Pint Vanilla Ice Cream or French Vanilla Ice Cream
Solo Brand Fruit Filling (your desired flavor)
recipeInstructions:
1. Add flour to margarine and crumble in pastry blender.
2. Add ice cream to the crumbled mixture and work into dough using dough hooks. If you don't have dough hooks, use your hands with rubber gloves to reduce cold exposure.
3. When the dough is smooth, shape it into a ball and refrigerate overnight.
4. Roll the dough to about 1/8-inch thickness on a floured surface.
5. Using the rim of a glass dipped in flour, cut out circles.
6. Place the kolacky on a cookie sheet and make a thumbprint in the center of each.
7. Fill the thumbprints with ½ teaspoon Solo filling.
8. Bake at 350 degrees for 20 minutes.
9. Sprinkle with powdered sugar when cool.
